description:
Advances: mutagen.coverage

Scope-expansion follow-up from mutagen-wrd.25.3 (S2). The orchestrator carved this out per `/orchestrate-epic` scope-expansion authority after .25.3's worker + verifier + auditor all flagged the same coordination gap.

## Why this exists

mutagen-wrd.25.3 landed the `Baseline.detect_async_modules/1` cache consumer (a capability — Baseline.run/1 can read AST from `cfg.ast_cache` when populated) and tests s9b/s9c lock that capability. BUT the production `phase_baseline` step at `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:695-735` builds `input = %{seed: seed, test_filter: test_filter}` without an `:ast_cache` key, so the live `mix mutagen` pipeline still uses the disk-read fallback path on cited test files.

The .25.3 ticket's Allowed touches explicitly restricted `mutagen.ex` to `phase_ast_cache only`, scoping `phase_baseline` out. Both the auditor (agent adc4689afabdd3b71) and verifier (agent ae38cb61079b7ea9c) confirmed the .25.3 contract was a CAPABILITY contract, satisfied module-side. This subticket lands the one-line wiring that turns the capability into a live perf win.

## Deliverable

- In `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` `phase_baseline`, add `ast_cache: cfg.ast_cache` to the input map passed to `Baseline.run/1`.
- In `do_pipeline`'s `with` chain, plumb the `ast_cache` from `phase_ast_cache`'s output through to `phase_baseline` (single-line addition similar to the .25.3 `phase_ast_cache` call-site update).
- Update or add a single integration test asserting `phase_baseline` consumes the cache when called via `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen.run/2`.

## Allowed touches

- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex
- test/mix/tasks/mutagen_test.exs (or new test/mutagen_ex/baseline_integration_test.exs)

## Out of Scope

- No changes to `Baseline.detect_async_modules/1` (already cache-aware from .25.3)
- No changes to `AstCache.load/2` (categories metadata stable from .25.3)
- No new collaborators on the facade contract

## Merge gate

- [ ] mix compile --warnings-as-errors green
- [ ] mix test green
- [ ] New integration test would fail if the wiring were silently removed
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE
title: S2-fu: wire ast_cache into phase_baseline production path
